name: prowlarr
description: Indexer manager for Sonarr, Radarr, and other arr apps

fields.name: PROWLARR_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: Port used to open Prowlarr in your browser.

fields.name: PROWLARR_CONFIG_LOCATION
fields.label: Prowlarr Config Folder
fields.help: Stores Prowlarr configuration, database, and application state.

fields.name: PUID
fields.label: PUID
fields.help: User ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: PGID
fields.label: PGID
fields.help: Group ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help:
Timezone used by Prowlarr for scheduled tasks and logs.
Example: Asia/Dubai.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: PROWLARR_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: PROWLARR_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Prowlarr.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: PROWLARR_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

ui.overview: Prowlarr helps you manage indexers in one place and connect them to Sonarr, Radarr, and other apps.
what_happens: A Prowlarr container will be created
Your config folder will be mounted into the container
You can keep the default bridge network or attach Prowlarr to an existing network
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
